title: Review: BigQuery Legacy SQL deprecation notice
body:
Thread ID: 19c9a60a635aef3b
From: Google Cloud <CloudPlatform-noreply@google.com>
Subject: [Product Update] Legacy SQL will no longer be available in BigQuery after June 1, 2026
Date: 2026-02-26

Action: Review BigQuery Legacy SQL deprecation notice. Assess impact on existing queries and data pipelines. Plan migration to Standard SQL.
